bullet_points: Load training maps using mmap_mode='r'.
Generate 3 noise realizations per training map to augment the dataset.
Compute WST coefficients (J=4, L=8) for all augmented maps.
Print the shape of the resulting feature array.
Standardize features (zero mean, unit variance) and save the scaler parameters (mean, std) along with the features to disk.
sub_tasks.sub_task: Pre-compute and standardize Wavelet Scattering Transform (WST) features.

bullet_points: Load standardized WST features and labels.
Implement a zuko NSF (8 transforms, 256 hidden dimension).
Train on the full augmented set, using 10% for validation.
Print final training/validation losses and save a loss-vs-epoch plot.
Save the trained model weights.
sub_tasks.sub_task: Train a Conditional Neural Spline Flow (NSF).

bullet_points: Partition data into 80 training and 21 validation cosmologies.
Re-train the NSF on the 80-cosmology subset.
Construct synthetic OoD proxies (e.g., Gaussian smoothing/shuffling) for the validation set.
Compute partial AUC (FPR 0.001–0.05) and save validation metrics and NLL distribution plots.
sub_tasks.sub_task: Validate the model using LOCO split and synthetic OoD proxies.

bullet_points: Load test maps and pre-trained NSF ensemble (3 models).
Compute WST features for test maps.
Calculate NLL scores averaged over a 5-sample grid of parameter marginals.
Compute uncertainty estimates (errorbars) from the ensemble.
Generate and save submission.zip.
sub_tasks.sub_task: Perform inference and generate the final submission.

bullet_points: Synthesize findings on higher-order statistics for hydro-code mismatch detection.

Report: (1) validation partial AUC (with/without nuisance marginalization), (2) NLL distribution plots (InD vs. synthetic OoD), (3) WST coefficient importance, (4) training/validation loss curves, and (5) final submission score.
Discuss robustness against nuisance parameters and scientific implications.
